title: Peaky Blinders: The Immortal Man
shortSynopsis: After his estranged son gets embroiled in a Nazi plot, self-exiled gangster Tommy Shelby must return to Birmingham to save his family — and his nation.

title: War Machine
shortSynopsis: On one last grueling mission during Army Ranger training, a combat engineer must lead his unit in a fight against a giant otherworldly killing machine.

title: Anaconda
shortSynopsis: A group of friends decides to shoot a remake of their favorite movie in the Amazon rainforest — where a giant serpent with a monster appetite lurks.

title: KPop Demon Hunters
shortSynopsis: When K-pop superstars Rumi, Mira and Zoey aren't selling out stadiums, they're using their secret powers to protect their fans from supernatural threats.

title: The Bad Guys 2
shortSynopsis: The Bad Guys are back — and trying to be Good! But when another team of thieves recruits the crew for one last heist, will they return to their old ways?

title: Minions: The Rise of Gru
shortSynopsis: Rejected by his supervillain idols, 12-year-old Gru sets out to prove his despicable nature with the help of his bumbling team of Minions.

title: What Happens in Vegas
shortSynopsis: After a drunken night in Vegas leads to a marriage they hardly remember, two strangers call it quits until a huge jackpot win forces them to be together.

title: 40 Acres
shortSynopsis: After a plague leaves the world in famine, a former soldier guards her family on their isolated, resource-rich farm as a violent militia closes in.

title: The Rise of the Red Hot Chili Peppers: Our Brother, Hillel
shortSynopsis: This candid documentary traces the formative years of the Red Hot Chili Peppers and the profound influence of original bandmate Hillel Slovak.

title: Louis Theroux: Inside the Manosphere
shortSynopsis: With rare access and no holds barred, the acclaimed documentarian investigates a growing ultra-masculine network and its controversial influencers.

title: Mardaani 3
shortSynopsis: Fearless cop Shivani Shivaji Roy returns to hunt down a ruthless criminal network responsible for kidnapping more than 90 girls across the country.

title: The Red Line
shortSynopsis: Three women fall prey to a ruthless phone scam. To settle the score, they'll take on the criminal network that stole their money — and their dignity.

title: BTS: THE RETURN
shortSynopsis: They're back! BTS gathers in LA to record their album "ARIRANG" in this documentary offering unprecedented access to the band as they enter a new era.

title: Dhurandhar
shortSynopsis: In the early 2000s, an undercover operative infiltrates Karachi's underworld, breaking into its inner circle to dismantle a violent nexus from within.

title: 53 Sundays
shortSynopsis: When three siblings agree to meet and discuss their aging father's future, their reunion spirals into bickering, bantering and reliving old grudges.

title: Border 2
shortSynopsis: Three idealistic soldiers in the Indian army, navy and air force face grueling combat conditions in this film set during the 1971 India-Pakistan War.

title: Made in Korea
shortSynopsis: A woman from a small town in Tamil Nadu moves to South Korea — a place she always dreamed of — but struggles to find her footing in a foreign land.

title: Pesugihan Sate Gagak
shortSynopsis: Three friends in dire need of cash enact a ritual involving crow satay, but the spell summons a parade of hungry ghosts demanding more.

title: It Would Be Night in Caracas
shortSynopsis: After her mother's death, Adelaida fights to survive a collapsing Venezuela, assuming a fragile new identity as grief and political violence close in.

title: Sous écrous
shortSynopsis: After he's framed by a notorious crook who looks just like him, a hapless law student ends up in prison and impersonates the criminal to survive.

title: ONE PIECE: Season 2
shortSynopsis: Luffy and the Straw Hat Pirates set sail for the legendary Grand Line, encountering wondrous new lands and fresh dangers in their quest for treasure.

title: Something Very Bad Is Going to Happen: Season 1
shortSynopsis: A bride has a feeling that something horrifying will happen at her wedding — and the closer to the altar she gets, the worse it becomes.

title: Beauty in Black: Season 2
shortSynopsis: As she takes the reins of the Bellarie empire, Kimmie confronts a vicious family power struggle, where betrayal, greed and danger lurk at every turn.

title: Virgin River: Season 7
shortSynopsis: Newly married, Mel and Jack pursue their dream of adopting a baby, while old loves smolder and new threats challenge Virgin River.

title: Homicide: New York: Season 2
shortSynopsis: In the city that never sleeps, an elite team of NYPD detectives relive the homicide investigations that defined their careers. These are their stories.

title: Raw: 2026 - March 23, 2026
shortSynopsis: Brock Lesnar emerges in Boston after Oba Femi accepts his WrestleMania 42 Open Challenge. The Usos collide with Logan Paul & Austin Theory.

title: The Predator of Seville: Limited Series
shortSynopsis: A sexual assault by a Spanish tour guide sparks a surge of similar claims from multiple US students. This documentary follows their fight for justice.

title: ONE PIECE: Season 1
shortSynopsis: With his straw hat and ragtag crew, young pirate Monkey D. Luffy goes on an epic voyage for treasure in this live-action adaptation of the popular manga.

title: Heartbreak High: Season 3
shortSynopsis: A prank gone wrong. An old flame returns. Amerie's final year at Hartley High gets off to a chaotic start, and she can't seem to catch a break.

title: Bridgerton: Season 4
shortSynopsis: In a new tale from the ton, eternal bachelor Benedict Bridgerton finally meets his match: a captivating lady's maid in disguise at a masquerade ball.

title: Radioactive Emergency: Season 1
shortSynopsis: Physicists and doctors race to contain a massive radiological disaster and save thousands of lives in this drama series inspired by true events.

title: Detective Hole: Season 1
shortSynopsis: When a series of ritualistic murders hits Oslo, a gifted detective must navigate a puzzle of patterns, corruption and his own demons to catch the killer.

title: BTS THE COMEBACK LIVE | ARIRANG
shortSynopsis: BTS makes their monumental return to celebrate the release of their new album with a global live performance from Seoul's historic Gwanghwamun Square.

title: Phantom Lawyer: Season 1
shortSynopsis: When he suddenly gains the ability to see ghosts, a quiet lawyer recruits an ambitious rival to help his quirky spectral clients find corporeal justice.

title: Pursuit of Jade: Season 1
shortSynopsis: To protect her family, a commoner marries a fallen nobleman. They fall in love, and she stands by him to fight for their future.

title: STEEL BALL RUN JoJo’s Bizarre Adventure: 1st STAGE
shortSynopsis: America, 1890. Johnny Joestar, a genius jockey now paralyzed from the waist down, chases after outlaw Gyro Zeppeli in a tough cross-continent horse race.

title: Season 2: Furies: Resistance
shortSynopsis: As a new order rules Paris' criminal underworld, the Furies embark on separate paths to organize a resistance and eliminate a shadowy leader.

title: That Night: Limited Series
shortSynopsis: When a young, naïve single mother gets embroiled in a murder during an island getaway, her sisters rush to help. But they only make things worse.

title: Boyfriend on Demand: Limited Series
shortSynopsis: Seo Mi-rae is worn out by work. Love? It's the last thing on her mind. But a virtual dating service sparks feelings — and maybe a real shot at romance.

title: Ready or Not: Texas: Season 1
shortSynopsis: No plans, just vibes. When two best friends and their crew set off for Texas on an entirely unscripted adventure, there's no telling what's coming next.
